summary: Adjusted the opening to avoid repeating Chapter 15's sleepless-opening scaffold while preserving the same pre-dawn tableau, and added a brief exit handoff for Fasa into the next chapter.
edits: Reframed the opening around Melie's sleeping grip and the hall's pre-dawn stillness instead of starting with Jin's sleeplessness.
Added a brief beat of Fasa turning back to the custodians' quarters after Fen sits beside Gitta.
